289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

406.issue_title: Russian Doll Decorator Pipeline for Exception Mapping

cycles.name: Interfaces & Type Foundation

deliverables.description: New ICoreTool generic interface in core/interfaces/icore_tool.py
Rename ITool to ILegacyTool in tools/base.py and update ToolErrorOutput signatures

cycles.exit_criteria: New interfaces compiled and legacy import conflicts resolved

cycles.name: Decorator Pipeline
cycles.exit_criteria: Unit tests verify decorator validation, enforcement checks, and error logging

cycles.name: CQRS Cache Segregation

deliverables.description: Segregated publisher and reader interfaces in core/interfaces/itool_response_cache.py
Update ResponseCacheManager concrete implementation and resource provider to use run_id instead of URI

cycles.exit_criteria: ResponseCacheManager put returns run_id and get deserializes target DTO class successfully

cycles.name: Presenter Engine & Fallback Unit Tests

deliverables.description: Update TextPresenter to implement fallback warning and JSON-dumping with traceback stripping

cycles.exit_criteria: Unit tests confirm TextPresenter strips traceback and appends inline JSON on run_id=None

cycles.name: ToolFactory & Bootstrap Prep

deliverables.description: Activate Ruff T20 print checking rule in pyproject.toml and quality.yaml

cycles.exit_criteria: ToolFactory successfully decorates tools and quality gates enforce T20 print rule

cycles.name: Tool-laag Migratie (Cycle 6a)

deliverables.description: Migrate all concrete tools under tools/ to ICoreTool and retire ILegacyTool/ToolExecutionEnvelope

cycles.exit_criteria: All 50 tool endpoints migrated to typed models and legacy files removed

cycles.name: Transport Orchestratie & E2E (Cycle 6b)

deliverables.description: Linear orchestration flow in server.py and E2E integration test suite in tests/mcp_server/integration/test_pipeline_e2e.py

cycles.exit_criteria: E2E test suite confirms decorator, cache, and presenter pipeline coordinates flawlessly on all execution paths
